title: AI_OS Night Supervisor Build-Prep Item
description: A build task PREPARED (not executed) during night/vacation supervision for the operator's return. Prep is planning evidence only. It never auto-executes, auto-approves, or mutates active packet/approval/runtime state. Lifecycle uses the canonical states from docs/workflows/WORKER_TASK_LIFECYCLE_STANDARD.md.

current_status.description: Canonical worker lifecycle state. Build-prep items are capped at ready_for_runner_preview; APPLY-side states require a separate approved packet.

approval_status.description: Approval state is independent of lifecycle and never grants APPLY by itself.

owning_path.description: Likely canonical repo path/owner for this work, for duplicate-prevention.

validator_needed.description: Validator or proof required before this item could ever be applied.
